data.title: Neurophet showcased 'Neurophet AQUA AD' at RSNA 2025, demonstrating brain imaging solutions for Alzheimer's treatment safety.
data.description: During an AI Theater session, cutting-edge brain imaging analysis solutions were showcased, such as 'Neurophet AQUA AD,' designed for tracking negative impacts linked to Alzheimer's disease treatments. The demonstration included clinical cases demonstrating enhanced safety in administering anti-amyloid therapy. This presentation highlighted advancements in the field and emphasized the importance of monitoring adverse effects. Such technology plays a crucial role in ensuring the well-being of individuals undergoing treatment for Alzheimer's disease.

data.title: Gametime and Barstool Sports collaborate on "12 Days of Gametime" giveaway, offering daily rewards and a $5,000 grand prize.
data.description: A Sweepstakes marking 12 years of fan memories offers daily prizes and a grand prize of $5,000. The mobile ticketing platform, Gametime, based in San Francisco, unveiled the "12 Days of" celebration on December 5, 2025. Participants stand a chance to win various rewards each day leading up to the grand prize of $5,000.

data.title: Three women leaders at WOW! recognized for their impact in the broadband industry. Leaders - Teresa Elder, Leslie Peabody, and Misty Jensen.
data.description: Three individuals, Teresa Elder, Leslie Peabody, and Misty Jensen, have been commended for their exceptional leadership and influence in the broadband sector. The recognition was bestowed upon them in Englewood, Colorado on December 5, 2025. This announcement was made by WOW! Internet, TV & Phone, which is a prominent broadband services company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WOW. Teresa Elder and her colleagues were acknowledged for their outstanding contributions to the industry.

data.title: Foundree42 launched, offers Salesforce consulting for modern enterprise stack. Focus on lean teams, smart architecture. Led by seasoned delivery.
data.description: A new company, Foundree42, was founded on December 5, 2025, with a focus on providing consulting services tailored for modern enterprise platforms. The company's model emphasizes smaller teams, efficient architecture, and adaptable solutions to keep pace with evolving business needs. The leadership team at Foundree42 brings a wealth of experience to the table to support their approach.

data.title: Seegene expands in Europe with French subsidiary, ninth overseas. France is second-largest market for molecular diagnostics.
data.description: France has recently been established as Seegene's ninth international sales subsidiary, making it the company's third presence in Europe alongside Italy and Germany. The country is recognized as Europe's second-largest market for molecular diagnostics. This growth is mainly attributed to the increasing demand for testing services in areas such as sexually transmitted infections, gastrointestinal conditions, and respiratory viruses. France's significance as a key market for Seegene's expansion is underscored by these factors.

data.title: MultiTech launches new LoRaWAN® DWS/ATH Sensor for facilities monitoring, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Mounds View, Minnesota, MultiTech unveiled its latest product, the DWS/ATH LoRaWAN® Door, Window, Temperature & Humidity Sensor. This innovative sensor is part of the company's Industrial IoT hardware offerings and aims to assist facility operators in decreasing energy consumption. MultiTech, a prominent global provider in this industry, is known for delivering cutting-edge solutions to its customers.

data.title: MoneyLion's Holiday Heist Giveaway provides $2,000 to 50 winners from Dec 5 to Jan 24 for financial relief.
data.description: Starting from December 5 until January 24, a lucky recipient will be awarded $2,000 daily for financial assistance. Recent findings from a MoneyLion survey indicate that a significant number of Americans are at risk of exceeding their holiday spending limits. The study reveals that households in 29 states are expected to succumb to this trend...

data.title: Old Forester releases new Prohibition Era Still Proof bourbon in its 117 Series, debuting on Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: Old Forester, the first bottled bourbon in America, will be launching its new limited edition Prohibition Era Still Proof on December 5, 2025, commemorating Repeal Day. The release is part of their renowned 117 Series and is set to captivate bourbon enthusiasts.

data.title: Research by Dodge & CMiC shows 87% of contractors optimistic about AI's impact on construction industry.
data.description: In Boston, Dodge Construction Network (Dodge) and CMiC have collaborated to present a new report, "AI for Contractors," analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on the construction sector. The study found that 87% of contractors anticipate AI will significantly influence the industry, foreseeing widespread changes. Over the years, construction companies have struggled to effectively utilize the data they gather. AI solutions are set to address this issue and drive transformation in the sector, marking a pivotal moment in the industry's evolution.

data.title: Roku CFO to present at 53rd Annual Nasdaq Investor Conference in London on Dec. 10, 2025 at 1:00 PM GMT. Live webcast available.
data.description: Roku, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROKU) disclosed that their Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer Dan Jedda is set to attend the 53rd Annual Nasdaq Investor Conference in London on Dec. 10, 2025. Jedda will be engaging in a fireside conversation at 1:00 PM GMT. For those interested, a live webcast and recording of each session will be accessible through Roku’s Investor Relations site at https://www.roku.com/investor. Roku, Inc. is recognized for spearheading TV streaming services, aiming to connect users through their innovative technology.

data.title: Toro Corp. reports net income of $1.3M for Q3 and $4.3M for 9 months ended Sept. 30, 2025. Energy transportation provider.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Limassol, Cyprus, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO), a leading global energy transportation company, disclosed its financial outcomes for the periods concluding on September 30, 2025. The report covered the company's performance over both the three-month and nine-month stretches.

data.title: NYSE partners with LA-based podcast TBPN, provides daily pre-market update. Details from December 5th given by Ashley Mastronardi.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. This report offers market insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor to assist traders ahead of the opening bell. Ashley Mastronardi presented the pre-market update for the day, providing essential information for investors. Stay informed with the latest data from the NYSE to make informed trading decisions.

data.title: Eucatex, led by CEO Flavio Maluf, wins "Best Product – Real Estate Line" at Abrart 2025 Award in São Paulo.
data.description: SÃO PAULO--Eucatex, headed by CEO Flavio Maluf, secured the "Best Product – Real Estate Line" award at the Abrart 2025 Award ceremony on November 6, 2025, at the Círculo Militar Club in São Paulo. The event assembled individuals from the paint sector including retailers, manufacturers, and distributors. Acknowledged by the Brazilian Association of Paint Retailers (Abrart), this award honors outstanding companies in specialized retail. CEO Maluf led Eucatex to be recognized among leading industry peers, emphasizing their commitment to excellence in the real estate product line.

data.title: WADL-TV in Detroit, a Top 14 TV market, removes Lionsgate's MovieSphere Gold from its lineup. WADL built from a permit 35 years ago.
data.description: In Detroit, Michigan, WADL, a TV station serving a Top 14 market, has recently decided to eliminate Lionsgate's MovieSphere Gold from its channel lineup. This change comes as WADL marks its 35th year since being established under a construction permit. WADL is known for being the last remaining...

data.title: National Police Association endorses the Strengthening Resources for Our Schools Act, supporting school resource officers for safer schools.
data.description: In Indianapolis on December 5, 2025, it was highlighted that school resource officers (SROs) play a vital role in ensuring school safety. These officers are seen as key in addressing the prevalent issue of violence in schools across the nation. Their ability to swiftly respond to active shooter situations and relay important information to other officers on the scene makes them crucial assets in maintaining security.

data.title: Morphy's Dec. 10-11 Auction to showcase luxurious items like 48-carat necklace, Rolex watches, Tiffany lamps, and unique art.
data.description: In the spotlight at Morphy's annual Winter Fine & Decorative auction in Denver, PA, on December 5, 2025, was an exquisite collection of luxury items. The auction showcased a stunning 48-carat platinum and diamond necklace, along with ruby and diamond earrings. Among the premium wristwatches up for bidding were coveted brands like Rolex and Cartier. The event also featured elegant Tiffany lamps, a rare Amphora dragon vase, and a 14K gold Tiffany jewel box once owned by a renowned movie star. This exclusive auction presented high-end items that appealed to collectors and enthusiasts alike.
Congresswoman Biggs has revealed recent stock transactions.

data.title: Waterdrop's revenue surged by 38.4% in Q3, with new tech services segment contributing 23% of revenue, despite lackluster stock performance.
data.description: Waterdrop Inc., an insurance broker, saw a 38.4% increase in revenue in the third quarter, with its young technical services business experiencing a 20-fold rise. The company is expected to return to strong revenue growth this year after three years of declines. The new technical services segment went from nearly no revenue last year to contributing 23% of revenue in the third quarter. Despite impressive growth, the company's shares only slightly rose after the announcement. The insurance brokerage business, which makes up the majority of Waterdrop's revenue, is facing challenges due to new regulations in China limiting profits. In response, Waterdrop is focusing on providing services to insurance companies and utilizing its databases to assist drug companies in patient identification for clinical trials. By diversifying its services, Waterdrop aims to navigate the changing landscape and continue its growth trajectory.
Transactions in DFDS shares by managers and closely related parties reported for public disclosure.

data.title: Eightcap partners with Orbital to enhance global trading with stablecoin payments in 120+ countries.
data.description: Eightcap has established stablecoins as the cornerstone of its worldwide trading system through a recent partnership. This collaboration aims to enhance funding and settlement processes across 120+ nations. The development, based in London, Tallinn, Estonia, and Gibraltar, was announced on December 5, 2025. Orbital, the platform facilitating cross-border transactions, will support this initiative.
